candidate_assessment.interpretation: Medium-grid SST is not yet correlation-plausible; further grid, boundary condition or numerics work is needed before model comparison.

cf_global_x_diagnostic_audit.later_correlation_note: This extraction records the shear component convention explicitly. Medium/fine correlation candidates should use local wall-tangent projection.
cf_global_x_diagnostic_audit.positive_cf_convention: positive in the local downstream wall-tangent direction of the external flow
cf_global_x_diagnostic_audit.raw_attached_region_definition: hump-wall cells with x < -2.0, falling back to first 20 percent if needed

cf_sign_audit.later_correlation_note: This extraction records the shear component convention explicitly. Medium/fine correlation candidates should use local wall-tangent projection.
cf_sign_audit.positive_cf_convention: positive in the local downstream wall-tangent direction of the external flow
cf_sign_audit.raw_attached_region_definition: hump-wall cells with x < -2.0, falling back to first 20 percent if needed
cf_sign_audit.raw_openfoam_wall_shear_field: wallShearStress projected onto downstream-oriented local wall tangent
